highLevelDependencies.name: Logging
highLevelDependencies.reuseJustification: Provides structured, levelled logging across all application layers.
highLevelDependencies.integrationStrategy: Use the SLF4J facade so the underlying implementation can be swapped without changing application code.
highLevelDependencies.validationStrategy: Unit tests verify that every log call site produces the expected log level and message.

highLevelDependencies.name: HTTP Client
highLevelDependencies.reuseJustification: Avoids reimplementing connection pooling, retries, and TLS handling.
highLevelDependencies.integrationStrategy: Wrap the client behind an application-level interface so it can be mocked in tests.
highLevelDependencies.validationStrategy: Integration tests run against a local WireMock stub server.

highLevelDependencies.name: JSON Serialisation
highLevelDependencies.reuseJustification: Standard, well-tested library used across the whole organisation.
highLevelDependencies.integrationStrategy: Configure a shared ObjectMapper bean and inject it wherever serialisation is needed.
highLevelDependencies.validationStrategy: Round-trip tests for every data-transfer object.
